name: Szechwan Noodle Salad in Peanut Sauce #2
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fettuccini or other thin noodles
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Peanut Sauce:
1. Combine ginger, garlic, 1 tablespoon green onion, peanut butter, soy sauce, vinegar, chili paste, sugar, sesame and vegetable oils, sherry, dry mustard, salt, and chicken stock in a bowl.
2. Blend thoroughly until smooth.
3. Cover and set aside at room temperature.
Noodles:
1. Cook fettuccini until tender.
2. While the noodles are still warm, toss with oil to coat evenly.
3. Chill the cooked noodles.
4. Place carrots in a sieve and pour boiling water over them. Immediately pat dry with paper towels and chill.
5. Wrap julienned green onions, ham, bean sprouts, cucumber, and red pepper separately and chill until serving time.
6. At serving time, bring noodles to room temperature before serving.
7. Place the noodles in the center of a large round bowl or platter.
8. Arrange vegetables and ham attractively in separate mounds around the edge.
9. Blend the peanut sauce again if needed and pour over noodles, vegetables, and ham.
10. Toss gently to combine.
Note: The noodles and sauce must be at room temperature when tossed and served. If cold, the sauce will lose its creamy consistency.
